query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, openAwaySpread, openTotal, openAwayML, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, publishedModel, publishedToFeed
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-23' AND sport = 'NHL'
ORDER BY startTimeEst;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute 
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, openAwaySpread, openTotal, openAwayML, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, publishedModel, publishedToFeed
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-23' AND sport = 'NHL'
ORDER BY startTimeEst;
